{{Quote|Our missiles are the best, which is why we are the recipient of the government contract for all missiles for Cartann's Blade-Thirties and Blade-Thirty-twos. A pilot like you can stake your life on a Challabae missile and know that it will serve your purpose faithfully and reliably.|Berandis to Wedge Antilles|<ref name="SOA" />}}
'''Berandis''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Adumari]] who served as the assistant manager of the [[Challabae Admits-No-Equal Aerial Eruptive Manufacturing Concern]], a missile manufacturing plant on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Adumar/Legends|Adumar]]. Berandis was in charge of public concerns for the company. In [[13 ABY/Legends|13 ABY]], Berandis gave a tour of the company's plant to [[Red Flight]]—a group of [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] veteran [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]]—during their diplomatic [[Mission to Adumar|mission]] to Adumar.<ref name="SOA" />

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Berandis is a character created by author [[Aaron Allston]] for the [[1999]] novel ''[[X-Wing: Starfighters of Adumar]]'', the ninth novel in the [[Star Wars: X-Wing (novel series)|''X-Wing'']] series.<ref name="SOA" />

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Starfighters of Adumar]]'' {{1st}}
